reason: Place user firmware in User/App and User/Driver; keep Core generated files thin.
Organize application feature modules under User/App and user drivers under User/Driver.
Preserve CubeMX ownership boundaries and keep ISR code minimal.
Follow HAL failure checks and fail-fast escalation for low-level init.
Keep callbacks thin and move work into task context.
Keep measurement state task-owned and synchronize ISR-visible data explicitly.
Keep app logic deterministic and observable.
Search for repeated patterns before adding helpers or constants.
Build measurement and serial functionality as clear app modules.
